title: Fisher Tiger Returns
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Fisher Tiger, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Royal Guards, Unknown person #5. The core beat is fisher tiger returns.
scene: The scene follows fisher tiger returns, keeping the focus on Fisher Tiger, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Royal Guards, Unknown person #5.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He did what nobody's ever been able to do before!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He put the tenryu- Ubito in their place!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Fisher Tiger is the hero of Fish-Man Island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So he actually went and did it....!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: You mean to free the slaves?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I cannot bear it...! The life of a slave is a hell - do you deny it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even now, as we stand here, they are suffering torments no person should have to face...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I have made my decision !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What in the world did you witness...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...on your latest journey. ..?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: ...Humans, your majesty!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Happened management

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Standing of Fish-Man Island has fallen once more...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will not be permitted to attend the next Reverie...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: yet when he came to us that day... I could not bear to stop him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The voice that I heard from his heart...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ..was torn in a terrible scream...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nudge

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Let us live together with the humans!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Above the waves, under the rays of the sun!! We must learn of their ways!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remember the President

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You!! Sign the document!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: I... I can't do that, your majesty.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The whole island is united in their support of Tiger-San's Great Deeds.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This incident has brought us further apart from the humans than ever.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But in the end, it's the humans that are in the wrong...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...so right now, we just can't...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Perhaps you are right, and it is impossible right now!! But what about in seven years?! or eleven years?! or fifteen?! I care not when!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lend me your support, for the sake of the day when our nation may once again take part in the Reverir!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The fish-man district

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: That Fisher Tiger's really something, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He used to be the boss around here, after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hear he saved tons of captive Fishmen!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Looks like the tenryu- Ubito are furious!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He really got them good!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hardy Jofles (great white shark fish-man) (15)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He put those annoying humans in their place!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong-san was always saying humans are nothing but trash! Kyakyah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Darruma

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They're just plain inferior!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Even now, the sun pirates are storming the world above the sea, beating up all those nasty humans, dosun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They're amazing, Dosun!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we were stronger, we could've gone with 'em,hhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Docuum

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: 1kauros Muhhi

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: You go, Sun Pirates!! Take 'em all down!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Kill all the humans!! Jahahaha hah!!!

summary: Fisher Tiger Returns. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
